name: container_map_4k_double_ownership
code:
proof fn phi_3_container_map_4k_double_ownership(
    pa: PageAllocator,
    c1: ContainerPtr,
    c2: ContainerPtr,
    p: PagePtr,
)
    requires
        c1 != c2,
        pa.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c1),
        pa.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c2),
        pa.container_map_4k@[c1].contains(p),
        pa.container_map_4k@[c2].contains(p),
    ensures
        false,
{
}
reason: container_map_4k Ghost field has no disjointness constraint — if two distinct containers both contain the same page, the spec should derive a contradiction but cannot

name: is_empty_vacuous_with_kernel_l4_end_512
code:
proof fn phi_4_is_empty_vacuous_with_kernel_l4_end_512(pt: PageTable, i: L4Index)
    requires
        pt.is_empty(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end == 512,
        0 <= i < 512,
    ensures
        pt.l4_table@[pt.cr3].value()[i].perm.present || !pt.l4_table@[pt.cr3].value()[i].perm.present,
{
}
reason: When kernel_l4_end == 512 the forall in is_empty is vacuously satisfied — L4 entries can have present == true since no index satisfies `512 <= i < 512`
